# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

---
http_filters:
- name: envoy.router
  typed_config: {}
- name: envoy.ratelimit.http
  typed_config:
    '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.ratelimit.http.v3.RateLimit
    requests_per_second: 1000000000
    unit: second
    action_on_cluster_quota_exceeded: OVERRIDE
    cluster:
      name: rateLimitCluster
      typed_config:
        '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.clusters.redis.v3.RedisCluster
cluster:
  name: rateLimitCluster
  connect_timeout: 5s
  type: REDIS
  redis_cache: {}
  lb_policy: CLUSTER_PROVIDED
  load_assignment:
    cluster_name: rateLimitCluster
    endpoints:
      - endpoint:
          address:
            socket_address:
              address: 172.30.89.42
              port_value: 6379
retry_policy:
  retry_on: connect-failure,upstream-reset
  num_retries: 50
timeouts:
  idle:
    ms: 500
---
# FilterChain(s)
  - name: ingress_filter_chain
      filters:
        - name: envoy.http.connection_manager
          config:
            codec_type: AUTO
            stat_prefix: ingress-gateway
            route_config:
              virtual_hosts:
                - name: envoy_vhost
                  domains:
                    - '*'
                  routes:
                    - match:
                        prefix: '/'
                      route:
                        cluster: eks-us-east-1-prod-backend
                        timeout: 30s
                        retry_policy:
                          retry_on: connect-failure,upstream-reset
                          num_retries: 50
            http_filters:
              - name: envoy.router
                typed_config: {}
